nasb.text: And Jesus knowing their thoughts said, “Why are you thinking evil in your hearts?

esv.text: But Jesus, knowing their thoughts, said, “Why do you think evil in your hearts?

cnv.text: 耶穌看出他們所想的，就說：“你們心裡為甚麼存著惡念呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣知道他们的心思，就说：“你们为什么心怀恶念呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣知道他们的想法，就说：“你们心里为什么怀着恶念呢？
